overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a player walking along an elevated walkway during a foggy, rainy night in a dystopian city. The player descends to street level and approaches a sports car with NPCs, concluding with a vehicle interaction prompt.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway overlooking city street

events.description: large illuminated All Foods billboard comes into view on the right side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along an elevated concrete walkway with metal railings, overlooking a foggy street below

entered.detail: tall industrial light pole with horizontal LED array illuminating the fog
wide concrete pedestrian walkway with metal railings on the sides
dense cluster of high-rise buildings with illuminated windows visible through fog
tall narrow digital display on building facade showing white text
large illuminated advertisement featuring a cartoonish mascot holding a product

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a foggy, rain-soaked night with the player walking along an elevated concrete walkway. Tall industrial light poles pierce through the haze, illuminating the scene with harsh white light. As the player moves forward, a large, brightly lit All Foods billboard comes into view on the right, contrasting with the dark city skyline in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with seating and planters

events.description: approaching concrete ramp leading down from elevated walkway to street level

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved elevated walkway, passing benches and planters while turning toward the descent ramp

entered.detail: rectangular concrete planter box with vegetation
concrete bench seating along the walkway
sloped concrete ramp with metal railings leading down to street level

segments.scene_description: The player continues along the elevated walkway, which curves gently through the urban environment. Concrete planters and benches line the path. The All Foods billboard recedes behind as the player approaches a ramp descending to the street level below, with the foggy city skyline remaining visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk at street level with palm tree landscaping

events.description: descending ramp from elevated walkway down to street level
turning left to follow the sidewalk along the main street

agents.ego_description: walking down the concrete ramp to street level, then proceeding along the palm-tree-lined sidewalk

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a bench near the sidewalk, partially obscured by fog

entered.detail: tall palm tree with fronds visible against the night sky
wet asphalt street with parked cars and traffic lights
tall building with illuminated '06' sign on the facade

segments.scene_description: The player descends the ramp from the elevated walkway to street level, transitioning from the semi-covered walkway to the open sidewalk. Palm trees line the street, and the wet concrete reflects the neon lights. A lone figure sits on a bench to the left as the player turns to follow the sidewalk, with tall buildings and digital billboards visible through the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with parked vehicle and NPC interaction

events.description: approaching a parked sports car with two people standing beside it on the street
vehicle interaction prompt 'Get in' appears on screen

agents.ego_description: approaching a sports car and two NPCs, preparing to enter the vehicle

notable_agents.action: futuristic sports car parked on the street with driver-side door open
woman with red hair and red pants standing beside the car, then entering the passenger seat

entered.detail: low-rise building with multiple large satellite dishes on the roof, illuminated by neon

segments.scene_description: The player reaches street level and approaches a futuristic sports car parked on the wet asphalt. Two NPCs stand beside the vehicle—one with distinctive red hair and clothing. In the background, a building with large satellite dishes is visible through the fog. As the player nears the car, a 'Get in' interaction prompt appears, indicating the transition to vehicle gameplay.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a desolate elevated walkway down into the neon-lit bustle of a rain-soaked dystopian street. It begins amidst a foggy night, moving past harsh industrial light poles and a glowing All Foods billboard that cuts through the haze. As the camera follows the curve of the concrete path past planters and benches, the walkway transitions into a descending ramp that leads away from the skyline toward the ground below. The scene then opens onto a wet sidewalk lined with palm trees and reflecting neon lights, passing a lone figure on a bench before turning toward the open asphalt. Finally, the movement concludes as the camera approaches a futuristic sports car and two NPCs, with a building topped by satellite dishes looming in the fog as a vehicle interaction prompt appears.
